ab: Maxal ka hngkwasan mu hngkawas nii.
Niqan ku Kingal qbsuran snaw, Kuras ka hangan na, maxal kingal ka hngkwasan na hngkawas nii.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫kuras，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kuras, he is 11 years old.

ab: Seupu nami meuyas patas kingal sapah pyasan ka yami.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Smkuxul meuyas uyas ka yaku ni qbsuran snaw.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Smkuxul ku tmapaq qsiya ka yaku, msangay o seupu nami musa tmapaq qsiya ka tnsapah.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Smkuxul ku pkkla bgurah dangi ka yaku, tduwa nami seupu musa meuyas uyas ni tmapaq qsiya.
ch: 我喜歡交新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
